diagrams.title: LCG Algorithm Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the iterative process of generating pseudorandom numbers using Linear Congruential Generator
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the LCG computational flow and understand each parameter's role

diagrams.title: Spectral Defect Visualization
diagrams.description: 2D projection showing hyperplane defect in poor quality LCG
diagrams.purpose: Understand why spectral test is important for evaluating LCG quality

diagrams.title: Hull-Dobell Theorem Conditions
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing conditions required for LCG to achieve full period
elements: Check: prime factors of m divide (a-1)
diagrams.purpose: Remember the three necessary and sufficient conditions for maximum period
